title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 167.806 - Plan to be submitted by parent or guardian of student with diabetes — review by school
text:
167.806.  Plan to be submitted by parent or guardian of student with diabetes — review by school. — The parent or guardian of each student with diabetes who seeks diabetes care while at school should submit to the school a diabetes medical management plan, which upon receipt shall be reviewed by the school.
(L. 2013 H.B. 675)
